train_name: Foundation T2 — Retrieval Decision + Grounding Gate (impl)
scope: Part A retrieval decision contract + Part B F2 RRF/F3 grounding gate skeleton. dev-shadow/additive output-only. NO real search/LLM/memory/Path A/F4-F8/Cosmile/SIASIU/contract/canonical/push.

skeleton.rrf: Reciprocal Rank Fusion deterministic (channel dedup + multi-channel sum); real BM25/vector/KB stub
skeleton.grounding_gate: hits+mode→{grounded,action}; fail-closed defer; product candidate=grounded; dev-shadow hits=∅

limitations: dev-shadow no real retrieval → grounding advisory(hits=∅+has_candidates); knowledge grounding real eval after F2 KB(SIASIU injection)
retrieval_decision/grounding = advisory output; Cosmile 2-step candidate call = separate train(guard safe meanwhile)
next_train: T3 Guardrail+Output Verify+Evidence Mode framework OR T2 real KB(F2 retrieval + SIASIU vocab injection) — Leo 판단
